title: diasperus marianus
intro: Diasperus marianus, also known as the Mary's thistle or milk thistle, is a plant in the aster family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Diasperus marianus lie in its seeds, which contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has been shown to have hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of liver and gallbladder disorders, as well as the protection against liver damage caused by toxins and medications. Diasperus marianus is often prepared as a supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as an extract in liquid or tincture form, which can be used to support liver health and promote overall well-being.
